response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship credentials (TDD, testing tooling, workshops), but he falls well short of the role's core minimum qualifications. C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, far from the required 8 years. His distributed-systems exposure (high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) was in DLang and lasted under 2 years, and he has no demonstrated cloud compute platform or formal technical-leadership track record at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries, and community teaching/mentoring via workshops
Hands-on high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Nowhere near 8 years of C++ experience; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No formal technical leadership role managing priorities, deadlines, or cross-team alignment
Limited large-scale cloud/compute infrastructure experience; background is mostly product and web engineering

key_factors.factor: Lack of technical leadership track record
